allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"deepseek-r1:14b","prompt":"你好，请用一句话介绍你自己","stream":false,"options":{"num_predict":100}}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('response:', d.get\('response',''\)[:200]\); print\('thinking:', d.get\('thinking',''\)[:200] if d.get\('thinking'\) else '\(empty\)'\); print\('done:', d.get\('done'\)\); print\('error:', d.get\('error','none'\)\)")
